scripts.agents: concurrently --names "SQL,OBSERVANILITY,ANALYTICS,COMMS,RESEARCH" --prefix-colors "blue,cyan,green,yellow,magenta" "npm run dev -w agents/sql-agent" "npm run dev -w agents/observability-agent" "npm run dev -w agents/analytics-agent" "npm run dev -w agents/comms-agent" "npm run dev -w agents/research-agent"
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "SQL,OBS,ANALYTICS,COMMS,RESEARCH,CLI" --prefix-colors "blue,cyan,green,yellow,magenta,white" "npm run dev -w agents/sql-agent" "npm run dev -w agents/observability-agent" "npm run dev -w agents/analytics-agent" "npm run dev -w agents/comms-agent" "npm run dev -w agents/research-agent" "npm start"
scripts.alfred: concurrently --names "SQL,OBS,ANALYTICS,COMMS,RESEARCH,ALFRED" --prefix-colors "blue,cyan,green,yellow,magenta,white" "npm run dev -w agents/sql-agent" "npm run dev -w agents/observability-agent" "npm run dev -w agents/analytics-agent" "npm run dev -w agents/comms-agent" "npm run dev -w agents/research-agent" "npm run voice"
scripts.telegram: concurrently --names "SQL,OBS,ANALYTICS,COMMS,RESEARCH,TELEGRAM" --prefix-colors "blue,cyan,green,yellow,magenta,white" "npm run dev -w agents/sql-agent" "npm run dev -w agents/observability-agent" "npm run dev -w agents/analytics-agent" "npm run dev -w agents/comms-agent" "npm run dev -w agents/research-agent" "npm run bot"
